payload.tactic: while (0 <= i <= size c /\ ek = _ek /\ mk = _mk /\ p = None /\ c = behead _c /\ s = (if 0 < i then nth witness c (i - 1) else head witness _c) /\ padded = cbc_dec AESi _ek (head witness _c) (take i c)) (size c - i).
